cookieConsent.title: We value your privacy
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. Some cookies are essential for the website to function properly, while analytics cookies help us understand how you use our site.
cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. This policy explains how we use cookies and your choices regarding cookies.
cookiePolicy.sections.whatAreCookies.con: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and understand how you interact with the site.
cookiePolicy.sections.essentialCookies.c:
We use only essential cookies that are necessary for our website to function properly. These cookies don't track your browsing activity on other websites or collect personal information. We don't use advertising or tracking cookies.

For detailed information about our use of cookies, including analytics cookies and how to manage your preferences, please see our Cookie Policy.
cookiePolicy.sections.essentialCookies.n: Essential cookies are always active and cannot be disabled.
cookiePolicy.sections.analyticsCookies.c: Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our website's functionality and content. We use Google Analytics 4 to gather this data.
cookiePolicy.sections.analyticsCookies.n: Analytics cookies are NOT loaded until you provide explicit consent through our cookie consent banner. If you decline analytics cookies, no tracking will occur.
cookiePolicy.sections.howToManage.title: How to Manage Cookies
cookiePolicy.sections.howToManage.conten: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Below are links to cookie management guides for popular browsers:
cookiePolicy.sections.consent.title: Your Consent
cookiePolicy.sections.consent.content: When you first visit our website, you will see a cookie consent banner asking you to accept or decline analytics cookies. Your preference is stored and remembered for future visits. You can change your preference at any time by clearing your browser's local storage and revisiting our site.
cookiePolicy.sections.updates.title: Policy Updates
cookiePolicy.sections.updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. Please revisit this page periodically to stay informed about our use of cookies.
cookiePolicy.sections.contact.title: Contact Us
cookiePolicy.sections.contact.content: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or this Cookie Policy, please contact us at:
cookiePolicy.sections.contact.note: We respond to all inquiries within 48 hours.
cookiePolicy.relatedPolicy: Learn more about how we handle your data:
cookiePolicy.relatedPolicyLink: Read our Privacy Policy to understand how we protect your personal information.
